summary: An unknown actor gained unauthorized access to 54 Below's network environment on May 15, 2025, potentially accessing and acquiring certain files containing individuals' personal information. The incident was discovered on May 15, 2025, and a comprehensive review of the affected data concluded on April 24, 2026. The breach may have involved personal information including names and other details.
title: Data Breach Notification

summary: Unauthorized access to Johnson, Webbert, & Beard, LLP's network occurred between September 15, 2025, and September 19, 2025, potentially exposing personal information. An investigation was conducted, and complimentary identity monitoring services were made available to affected individuals. The incident was reported to law enforcement.
title: Data Breach Notification

summary: 2nd Swing experienced a cyber security event where an unauthorized individual may have accessed customer information between March 30, 2026, and March 31, 2026. The potentially impacted data included customer names and other information. 2nd Swing is providing credit monitoring services to affected customers.
title: Data Breach Notification
